errors.message: Division by zero may crash the program.
Loop may run forever without a stopping condition.
errors.solution: Add break condition or valid loop condition.

errors.message: Pointer is declared but not initialized.
errors.solution: Initialize pointer with nullptr or allocate memory.

errors.message: Memory is allocated using new but not released.
errors.solution: Use delete or delete[] to free memory.

errors.message: Pointer is declared but not initialized.
errors.solution: Initialize pointer with nullptr or allocate memory.

errors.message: Array index exceeds declared array size.
errors.solution: Use index within valid array range.

errors.message: Array index exceeds declared array size.
errors.solution: Use index within valid array range.

errors.message: Dynamic memory is used but destructor is missing.
